stakeholders.Role: Engaged in sustainability reporting and implementing environmental initiatives.

Source metadata.extraction_context: DBS is amember of the SRAC, which was jointly set up by Singapore's Accounting and Corporate Regulatory Authority (ACRA) and the Singapore Exchange Regulation (SGX RegCo). The committee is responsible for developing a sustainability reporting roadmap for Singapore-incorporated companies, including the adoption of the International Financial Reporting Standards’ (IFRS) sustainability standards.

stakeholders.Role: Oversight and regulation of financial stability and sustainability initiatives in Singapore.

stakeholders.Role: Ensures compliance with ethical requirements and professional standards for public accountants.
